title: sarkman 6x Extra Large Rat Traps That Kill Instantly - Heavy Duty Rat Trap for Indoors & Outdoors | Full Pest Control Kit with Reusable Snap Trap, Gloves & Cleaning Brush
features: 【Extra Large Size – Built to Catch the Toughest Rodents】Measuring a massive 17 cm x 8 cm, this is the largest rat traps for outdoors on the market — ideal for tough jobs. Its oversized design increases success with rat killer outdoor use cases and even doubles as a squirrel trap when needed. Perfect for barns, gardens, and commercial spaces, this trap enhances rodent control by catching large, aggressive pests that typical traps can’t handle.

【Built to Last – Heavy-Duty Stainless Steel Power】This rat catcher is engineered with thick stainless steel and a high-tension spring for reliable, instant results. No toxins needed — just pure mechanical force. Ideal for homes, sheds, and businesses looking for rat killer indoor solutions or durable pest control products that actually work. Listed among top-rated rat traps Amazon shoppers trust, it's designed to perform where traditional traps fail.

【Includes Gloves & Brushes – Full Kit for Safe Use & Reuse】Your order comes with 50 pairs of disposable gloves and cleaning brushes, making setup and reuse hygienic and hassle-free. The gloves reduce human scent, improving catch efficiency. While this is not a humanne trap, many customers searching for it turn to this model for its clean, instant kill — avoiding poisons and prolonged suffering.

【Quick, Reusable & Proven to Work Indoors】This is one of the most efficient rat traps that work — designed for speed, ease of use, and multiple reuses. Whether you’re tackling pests in your garage, loft, or kitchen, it’s ideal for those needing reliable rat traps for indoors. Setup takes seconds, and cleanup is just as fast thanks to the included gloves and brushes. A must-have tool for serious rodent control.

【100% Satisfaction Guarantee – Shop with Confidence】We stand behind our heavy duty rat traps with a full money-back or replacement guarantee. If you're not completely satisfied, we’ll make it right — no questions asked. Join thousands of UK customers who trust our traps for fast, effective results. Your purchase is protected, so you can buy with total confidence.
